name: nushell-skill
description: Nushell-aware terminal command patterns for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Run terminal tasks with Nu-aware patterns
interface.longDescription: A Codex plugin that packages the Nushell agent skill for terminal commands, structured pipelines, safe environment checks, and bash/zsh-to-Nu translation.
defaultPrompt: Use Nushell-aware syntax for this terminal task.
Translate this shell command to Nushell.
